user.bio: Graduate student in Computer Science with a strong background in full-stack web development and Computer Engineering. Experienced in leading technical teams and building scalable applications. Passionate about web development and continuous growth as a full-stack engineer.

workExperience.description: Assisting in teaching and research activities in the Computer Science department.

Developed various web applications: a boutique store, a portfolio management system for the Nepal Stock Exchange, and an Animal Finder app, using React, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, and external APIs.

Led the merger of three departments into a Frontend Department, ensuring knowledge transfer and collaboration. Implemented micro frontends and mono-repo for project efficiency, and improved code quality with Vitest c8 and React Testing Library.

Managed an 8-member team for the Employee Evaluation System, organized Code Camps, and improved workflows with GitLab pipelines and modern practices. Conducted knowledge-sharing sessions and research on frontend technologies.
Built the Digital Lending System, integrating various services, and led a React team for the Nepal Audit Management System.
Developed the Advertisement Management System, improved projects with Kanban boards and WYSIWYG editors, and introduced TypeScript in React.
Developed the Weapon Inventory Management System for Nepal Police, enhanced the Online Police Clearance Report system, and created a data visualization module for NTIP.
Worked on real-world projects under supervision and created structured project documentation.
Developed and delivered training programs for Node.js and React Js, training over 30 participants in web development.
